description: Was providing a short chip call for the duration of my visit. The bird was not shy and would travel back and forth between two yards. One with a tree it liked to perch the other yard had the feeder it was visiting. I was able to see the bird coming back to the tree in the other yard while still having seeds in the mouth. Was not interacting much with the nearby House Finches, Song Sparrow, Black-capped Chickadees, and Starlings. It kept to itself only making breif trips to get seed from the feeder.
